def test_user_lifecycle():
    # Violation: test function covers multiple unrelated scenarios
    user = create_user("alice")
    assert user.name == "alice"
    
    user.email = "alice@example.com"
    update_user(user)
    assert get_user(user.id).email == "alice@example.com"
    
    delete_user(user.id)
    assert get_user(user.id) is None
